summary: Comprehensive testing of Trend Syria E-commerce App - Iteration 143. Backend API tests: 35/37 passed (94.6%). Frontend UI tests: All major flows working correctly. RTL layout verified. All user types (buyer, seller, driver, admin) can login successfully.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint may not exist or different path

issues: Product image placeholder showing instead of actual image (broken image icon)

action_items: Fix product image loading on product detail page - showing placeholder instead of actual image
critical_code_review_comments: All authentication flows working correctly for all 4 user types
Cart and checkout flow working properly
RTL layout correctly implemented throughout the app
Admin dashboard has comprehensive management sections
Seller dashboard shows orders, products, and wallet balance
Driver dashboard shows available orders and earnings
seed_data_creation: Existing seed data used: 1 Super Admin, 1 Seller (متجر النور للإلكترونيات), 1 Driver (أحمد), 1 Buyer (محمد العسيل), 1 Product (آيفون 15 برو ماكس - 5,500,000 ل.س), 1 Completed Order
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major flows tested and working. Backend APIs are stable. Frontend UI is functional with RTL layout. Minor issue: product images showing placeholder. OTP verification is MOCKED with code 123456.

homepage.categories_section: ✅ Visible with 18 product categories + 7 food categories
homepage.products_section: ✅ Shows best sellers and new products
homepage.navigation_bar: ✅ All tabs working (الرئيسية, الأصناف, طعام, السلة, حسابي)

admin_dashboard.stats_cards: ✅ Shows join requests, suspended stores, withdrawal requests
